     the Fermi energy is    -0.4607 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.85173911 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          6.5E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08766061 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.76407849 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -238367.07754393 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120285.40947603 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4211.00669622 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110523.92335660 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01267098 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.65 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  32 iterations

     negative rho (up, down):  5.428E-03 5.150E-03
